testcase.name: test_create_new_task_intent

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected create/mixed, got update assert 'update' in ['create', 'mixed']

testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration5_voice_features.py:28: in test_create_new_task_intent assert data["intent"] in ["create", "mixed"], f"Expected create/mixed, got {data['intent']}" E AssertionError: Expected create/mixed, got update E assert 'update' in ['create', 'mixed']
